description_long: This is a rectangular box of Kellogg's Corn Flakes breakfast cereal, featuring a predominantly white background with red and black text. The front displays the Kellogg's logo in red script at the top, the product name in bold black letters, and a colorful rooster graphic, along with a photograph of a woman holding a bouquet of red flowers. The side panels contain detailed nutritional information and promotional content, while the back showcases family-themed imagery and additional promotional offers. The box is made of cardboard and is likely filled with air and cereal flakes inside. The overall appearance is clean, with clear branding and a classic cereal box design.
description: A white rectangular Kellogg's Corn Flakes cereal box with red and black branding, a rooster graphic, and promotional imagery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Kellogg's logo, Corn Flakes branding, rooster graphic, and a woman's portrait with flowers.
description_view_1: Side view displaying nutritional information and product details in black text on a yellowish background.
description_view_2: Back view featuring family photos, promotional offers, and additional product information.
description_view_3: Opposite side panel with more product branding, promotional graphics, and proof of purchase details.
attribute_brand_logo: The Kellogg's logo is visible on the front and side panels, written in red cursive script at the top of the box.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information is visible on the side panel, including a nutrition facts panel and ingredients list.
attribute_promotional_graphics: Front panel features a $5.00 savings offer and a rooster mascot; back panel includes a family-themed promotional offer and discount graphics.

license_info.creator_display_name: Santa Cruz Museum of Art and History
